title: Arturo Rosenblueth
body: Arturo Rosenblueth Stearns (October 2, 1900 Chihuahua – September 20, 1970 Mexico City) was a Mexican researcher, physician and physiologist, who is known as one of the pioneers of cybernetics.
categories: Academic staff of the Instituto Politécnico Nacional
Academic staff of the National Autonomous University of Mexico
Burials at the Panteón de Dolores
National Prize for Arts and Sciences (Mexico)
